goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Accept the inventory-management and integrated happy-path milestone. T038-T062 prove complete inventory actions, accessibility, responsive rendering, persistence, migrations, protected-work integrity, 190 unit and 114 integration tests, isolated build, and the 400/350/50 integrated workflow. The original outcome remains incomplete because cards expose only a coarse state, the library has no Pantry filters, recipe details lack batch/location and planned-demand context, and projected demand includes completed meals with no skipped/cancelled status or expiry-conflict semantics.

worker_package.objective: Complete one recipe-and-planner Pantry vertical slice without reopening proven inventory management: add compact truthful recipe-card insights and Pantry library filters; enrich serving-scaled recipe details with required, exact available, shortage, optionality, matching locations/batches, planned-period commitments, projected remaining stock, and expiry context; add durable planned/skipped/cancelled meal status and derive cooked status from completed linked cook sessions; exclude skipped, cancelled, and cooked meals from projected demand; allocate projected demand chronologically without mutating stock; expose covered, shortage, uncertainty, later-week exhaustion, earliest relevant expiry, and stock-expiring-before-meal conflicts without food-safety claims. Preserve recipe text, required-first allocation, compatible-unit rules, ActorContext, trusted origins, profiles-not-auth, and all proven inventory behavior. Leave grocery formula/intake and cooking confirmation UI for later.
verify: Scoped Prettier over every changed recipe/planner Pantry file
Focused Pantry availability, schema, component, service, and household tests
Isolated production build without using shared .next
Focused isolated Playwright at 390, 768, and 1280 with keyboard, axe, persisted reload, screenshots, responsive containment, and no browser errors
stop_if: Existing meal-plan state can durably represent planned, skipped, and cancelled semantics; omit 0025 rather than adding redundant persistence.
Any migration beyond one additive meal_plan_entries status column and supporting index is required, or an applied migration would change.
Recipe filtering would duplicate or weaken Pantry uncertainty, required-first allocation, compatible-unit, or optional-ingredient semantics.
Expiry handling would infer food safety, count stock as usable after a recorded conflict without disclosure, or mutate physical inventory.
Cooked exclusion cannot be derived from completed cook_sessions linked by meal_plan_entry_id without modifying the proven cooking transaction.
Implementation requires grocery, intake, cooking, deduction, undo, leftover, Nutrition, or files outside allowed_files.
ActorContext, exact trusted-origin checks, recipe text, profiles-not-auth, protected hashes, or concurrent dirty work would be weakened or overwritten.
Verification requires live/shared data, credentials, provider calls, or disruption of another active process.

evidence: T062 proves the full 400/350/50 integrated flow, provenance/manual behavior, intake, confirmed FEFO history, accessibility, screenshots, persistence, disposable migrations, and no browser errors.
T038-T058 prove advanced inventory management and truthful expiry presentation across desktop, tablet, and mobile.
RecipeSummaryCard currently exposes only a coarse Pantry state and RecipeLibraryFilters has no Pantry filter.
RecipePantryPanel lacks matching batches/locations, other planned demand, projected remainder, and expiry conflict context.
Projected demand currently includes every linked meal in range and meal_plan_entries has no status, while completed cook sessions can derive cooked exclusion.

parallel_safety.rationale: Recipe filters, availability calculations, planner status, chronological allocation, shared UI, migration, and browser proof form one coupled vertical slice.

missing_evidence: Pantry library filters and richer card insights
Persisted skipped/cancelled controls and derived cooked status
Chronological shared-stock allocation and expiry conflict evidence
Later grocery and cooking UI slices
required_board_updates: Record T063 done and accept the inventory milestone.
Create and activate T064 Worker exactly from worker_package.
Keep T999 blocked and require another Judge after T064.
